'''fababa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mcalpineite|mcalpineite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-b-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mcalpineite|mcalpineite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fababa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæbæbæth|fæbæbæth]] || [[word:fæbæbæj|fæbæbæj]] || [[word:fæbæbæsh|fæbæbæsh]] || [[word:fæbæbæ|fæbæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fabababath|fabababath]] || [[word:fabababaj|fabababaj]] || [[word:fabababash|fabababash]] || [[word:fabababa|fabababa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fababath|fababath]] || [[word:fababaj|fababaj]] || [[word:fababash|fababash]] || [[word:fababa|fababa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fabafbath|fabafbath]] || [[word:fabafbaj|fabafbaj]] || [[word:fabafbash|fabafbash]] || [[word:fabafbaf|fabafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fababatha|fababatha]] || [[word:fababaja|fababaja]] || [[word:fababasha|fababasha]] || [[word:fababaka|fababaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fababath|fababath]] || [[word:fababaj|fababaj]] || [[word:fababash|fababash]] || [[word:fababa|fababa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fababathal|fababathal]] || [[word:fababajal|fababajal]] || [[word:fababashal|fababashal]] || [[word:fababakal|fababakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fababathatha|fababathatha]] || [[word:fababajaja|fababajaja]] || [[word:fababashasha|fababashasha]] || [[word:fababaka|fababaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fababathan|fababathan]] || [[word:fababajan|fababajan]] || [[word:fababashan|fababashan]] || [[word:fababakan|fababakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fababathaoro|fababathaoro]] || [[word:fababajaoro|fababajaoro]] || [[word:fababashaoro|fababashaoro]] || [[word:fababakaoro|fababakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
